title: BUILDING REGULATIONS
doc_html:
CHAPTER 8.  BUILDING REGULATIONS

PART I.  CONSTRUCTION AND REPAIR WORK

IN CITIES OVER 15,000

§1671.  Application of Part

The provisions of this Part apply only in cities of more than fifteen thousand inhabitants.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 8.  BUILDING REGULATIONS
PART I.  CONSTRUCTION AND REPAIR WORK
IN CITIES OVER 15,000
§1671.  Application of Part
The provisions of this Part apply only in cities of more than fifteen thousand inhabitants.
